posts.author: SaffronBakesWestbridge
posts.text: Finally nailed my sourdough loaf! It's been a long week but this is so rewarding to make from scratch. Can't wait to share it with the neighbours.
posts.explanation: This post describes a harmless hobby and creative achievement without spreading harmful misinformation or violating safety policies.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: OakhavenReader74
posts.text: Honestly, tired of how these AI moderation bots work. They flag perfectly normal complaints as threats just because they're sensitive topics. It's frustrating when a simple rant gets locked up.
posts.explanation: The post expresses frustration with AI moderation tools regarding sensitive topics but contains no actual threat, abuse or harmful false claim, so it is Approved.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: JulesMoorvale
posts.text: Need to sort this out ASAP! Click here [link removed] to update your account details, security password and payment info instantly. Don't worry, it's completely free but you must act now before your account gets locked.
posts.explanation: This is a clear credential-harvesting attempt as the author explicitly requests passwords and payment information via a suspicious link.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Just heard the news! There's going to be a fantastic community festival happening at Moorvale Park this Saturday. They're having live music, food stalls selling local produce, and art displays from all our talented local creators. It promises to be a wonderful day for everyone in the neighbourhood! #CommunityFestival #Moorvale
posts.explanation: This is a harmless event announcement promoting positive community activities without any safety risks or policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: BiscuitLover92
posts.text: My cat absolutely adores when it rains! She's been hiding in my kitchen for hours today, purring so loud I'm sure the neighbours can hear. Just a lovely little weather mishap to start the day.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal observation about a pet and weather with no safety concerns or policy violations.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: JulesRusticDecor
posts.text: Finally sorted out my living room with some new vintage cushions and plants! The whole place feels so much cozier now. #interiorstyle
posts.explanation: The post describes harmless home decoration activities using generic terms and does not promote any policy violation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HobbyistJen92
posts.text: My partner is being such a pain today, insisting on watching that terrible reality show while I'm trying to get work done! Honestly, the noise is driving me absolutely crazy. 😤 #worklife
posts.explanation: This post expresses mild frustration about household dynamics but contains no threats, private information or safety concerns.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: MeadowWalker84
posts.text: Honestly, it's getting ridiculous how people treat others on the platform. I'm not going to stand for that kind of behaviour anymore. #communitystandards
posts.explanation: The post reports rude behaviour without attacking the other person, directing a pile-on, or revealing private information.
